page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A tool for accurate prediction of potential lncRNA disease associations.

Potential lncRNA-disease association prediction.

ICLRBBN, a tool for accurate prediction of potential lncRNA-disease associations using internal confidence based local radial basis biological network.
